Risk ID: 1. If ransomware infection exploits flat network architecture then impact is High on Patient Database.
2. If account takeover exploits shared user accounts then impact is Critical on Telemedicine Platform.
3. If data loss exploits untested backup restoration then impact is High on Backup System.
4. If phishing attack exploits lack of user awareness then impact is High on Microsoft 365 accounts.
5. If unauthorized access exploits weak access control then impact is High on Patient Records.
6. If Virtual Private Network (VPN) compromise exploits weak authentication then impact is High on Internal Network.
7. If malware infection exploits outdated endpoints then impact is Medium on Windows laptops
Asset: but may escalate to High if lateral movement occurs.

Risk ID: 8. If insider misuse exploits excessive privileges then impact is High on HR Data.
9. If data breach exploits misconfigured cloud services then impact is Critical on Telemedicine Video Records.
10. If system outage exploits single point of failure then impact is Medium on Lab Diagnostics System.
